title: Void (disambiguation)
content:
'''Void''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Dragon Void Run]]''', a race
*'''[[Intergalactic void]]''', the space between galaxies
*'''The Void''', another name for [[Chaos]]
*'''[[The Void]]''', the featureless desert of the [[planet]] [[Abafar]]
*'''[[Tulon Voidgazer]]''', a [[cyborg]]
*'''[[Void]]''', a slang term
*'''[[Void of Chopani]]''', a region in the [[Chopani sector]]
*'''[[Void Spider TX-3]]''', a model of ground vehicle
*'''[[Void strider]]''', a species native to Abafar's Void

==Legends==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Harridax Kirill]]''', known as "'''the Voidwolf'''"
*'''[[Void (protocol droid)|Void]]''', a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]].
*'''[[Voidhound]]''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who served as a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] privateer during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]

===Creatures===
*'''[[Void spider]]''', a kind of arachnid
*'''[[Void Strider]]''', a species native to Abafar's Void

===Groups===
*'''[[Sisters of the Void]]'''
*'''[[Void Demons]]''', a pirate organization
*'''[[Void Jumper]]''', a unit of the [[Galactic Alliance Marines]]
*'''[[Void Wings/Legends|Void Wings]]''', a pirate organization
*'''[[Voidwolf's personal strike fleet]]'''

===Locations===
*'''[[Continuum Void]]''', a [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] on [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]]
*'''[[Intergalactic Void]]''', the space between galaxies
*'''[[Keller's Void/Legends|Keller's Void]]''', an empty area of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]
*'''[[Marcol Void/Legends|Marcol Void]]''', an empty expanse of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]
*'''[[Radama Void/Legends|Radama Void]]''', an area surrounding [[Ord Radama/Legends|Ord Radama]]
*'''[[Twilight Void/Legends|Twilight Void]]''', a location in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]
*'''[[The Void/Legends|The Void]]''', the featureless desert of the planet [[Abafar/Legends|Abafar]]
*'''[[The Void (Corellian system)|The Void]]''', an area of space in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]
*'''[[Void Anvil]]''', a planned mining station
*'''[[Void Demon pirate base]]''', on the planetoid [[Isen IV]]
*'''[[Void Imports]]''', a black market shop
*'''[[Void of Aogros/Legends|Void of Aogros]]''', an empty area in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] containing [[The Quintarad/Legends|the Quintarad]]
*'''[[Void of Chopani/Legends|Void of Chopani]]''', an empty region in the [[Chopani sector/Legends|Chopani sector]]
*'''[[Void Station system/Legends|Void Station system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]
**'''[[Void Station]]''', an asteroid base
*'''[[Voidfire Nebula/Legends|Voidfire Nebula]]''', a nebula in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]

===Religion===
*'''[[Chaos/Legends|Chaos]]''', also known as "'''The Void'''" or "'''Hell'''"
*'''[[Prophet of the Void]]''', title of the leader of the [[Charon Death Cult]]
*'''[[Void of Death]]''', a belief of the [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] [[Species/Legends|species]]
*'''[[Void Stone]]''', a Charon holy relic

===Vehicles===
*'''''[[Void Cutter]]''''', a [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] belonging to [[Zothip]]
*'''[[Void Spider TX-3 Air Taxi]]''', a model of speeder
*'''''[[Voidraker]]''''', a freighter belonging to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*'''''[[Voidrunner]]''''', a starship belonging to [[Bey]]
*'''''[[Voidstar]]''''', a prototype battleship

===Weapons===
*'''[[Chestrashi void spear]]''', a [[Chestrashi]] [[Spear/Legends|spear]]
*'''[[The Void (weapon)|The Void]]''', a heavy weapon
*'''[[Void-7 seismic charge/Legends|Void-7 seismic charge]]''', a type of [[Seismic charge/Legends|seismic charge]]

===Other===
*'''[[Void Droid]]''', masterless droids that went insane due to a lack of maintenance
*'''[[Voidfight]]''', a term for starfighter combat in dark areas of deep space
*'[[Force void/Legends|''Void in the Force''']], a term used to refer to anyone who could make themselves impossible to track with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]

==Real world==
*'''''[[Dawn of the Jedi: Into the Void]]''''', a novel
*'''''[[Emissary of the Void]]''''', a six-part serial in the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'' series]]
*'''[[Star Wars (1977) 38|''Star Wars'' (1977) 38]]''', the thirty-eighth issue of [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'' (1977)]]
*'''[[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]]''', the sixty-first issue of [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'' (1977)]]
*"'''[[A Sunny Day in the Void]]'''", an episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
*'''''[[The Void Terror]]''''', an article in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]]
*'''[[The VOID]]''', a [[Wikipedia:Virtual reality|virtual reality]] company that created ''[[Star Wars: Secrets of the Empire]]''

{{Disambig}}
